component.name: Jellyburn
component.summary: Browse your Jellyfin music library and burn audio CDs

description.p: Jellyburn is a GTK desktop app for browsing a Jellyfin music server, building playlists, and burning them directly to audio CD.

ul.li: Connects to any Jellyfin server via API key or username/password
Artist/album browser with search and sortable columns
Playback via mpv with a 10-band equalizer
Playlist builder with drag-and-drop reordering, multiple saved playlists
Burns audio CDs (with optional CD-Text) or falls back to an MP3 data CD for long playlists

description.p: Multi-playlist management, CD-Text, MP3 data CD fallback for long playlists, 10-band equalizer, right-click album actions.
